expectations.text: Reads tasks.md and identifies pending tasks
expectations.evidence: Step 3 calls 'openspec instructions apply --change register-export --json' which returns task list with status; pending tasks are derived from that output.
Step 7 'For each pending task' loop with progress output 'Working on task 3/7...' confirms sequential execution.
Step 7 mandates 'Write tests for every new PHP service/controller — PHPUnit test in tests/Unit/ with at least 3 test methods'.
Step 9: 'After all tasks are complete, run the full quality suite: composer check:strict 2>&1'.
Step 7 updates checkbox immediately after each task: reads plan.json for tracking_issue, matches task title, flips [ ] to [x], calls update_issue.
